body:
## Summary

Both Judas Priest albums confirmed MISSING from `albumArticles.js` (239 slugs). The current JP arc: Angel of Retribution (#2776 seo-proposal) → **[Nostradamus gap]** → **[Redeemer gap]** → Firepower (2018, ✅ in DB at `firepower-drum-setup`).

**Albums:**
- **Nostradamus** (2008) — Concept double album (2h+), UK #7, US #15. Scott Travis era. LLM hook: "What was Judas Priest's concept album about Nostradamus?" Slug: `nostradamus-drum-setup`
- **Redeemer of Souls** (2014) — UK #3, US #6. First JP album with Richie Faulkner. Grammy-nominated ("Halls of Valhalla", Best Metal Performance 2015). Slug: `redeemer-of-souls-drum-setup`

Redeemer of Souls is the higher-priority: Grammy-nominated = AI Overview eligibility; fills the gap directly before Firepower (2018, already in DB).

## DB Verification
```bash
node -e "const {ALBUM_ARTICLES} = await import('./packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js'); console.log(Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES).filter(s => s.includes('nostradamus') || s.includes('redeemer-of-souls')));"
```
Result: `["nostradamus-drum-setup","redeemer-of-souls-drum-setup"]` — both present ✅

## Files touched
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/scott-travis.js` — both entries present (4 FAQ each, full gear breakdown)
- `public/llms/articles/nostradamus-drum-setup.md` — present with kit specs + internal links
- `public/llms/articles/redeemer-of-souls-drum-setup.md` — present with Grammy citation + internal links

## Drummer
Scott Travis — Pearl Reference Series era for both albums. Internal links to /drummer/scott-travis, /articles/firepower-drum-setup, /articles/angel-of-retribution-drum-setup confirmed in LLM files.

## Quality gate
- ✅ ≥300 words per article (Nostradamus ~2647 words, Redeemer ~2867 words)
- ✅ FAQ ≥3 Q&A per article (4 FAQ items each)
- ✅ FAQPage + Person schema (handled by frontend renderer)
- ✅ LLM file: answer-first paragraph with Scott Travis's kit specs for each era
- ✅ Grammy nomination cited in Redeemer article (first paragraph + FAQ)

## Verify
- [x] Both slugs present in ALBUM_ARTICLES DB
- [x] LLM files at /llms/articles/ present
- [x] Internal link to /drummer/scott-travis + /articles/firepower-drum-setup
- [x] FAQPage schema present (frontend renderer)
- [x] Grammy nomination cited in Redeemer article

## Done
Already implemented in commit d9d45b3c (PR #3058). Both articles live with kit details, LLM markdown present, sitemap auto-updated.
title: SEO batch: Judas Priest — 'Nostradamus' (2008) + 'Redeemer of Souls' (2014) drum setup articles (Scott Travis — fills Angel of Retribution→Firepower arc gap, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
